title: Multi‑Brand Gift Card Rules
description: What are the detailed rules, restrictions, and acceptance details for multi‑brand gift cards such as UpCadhoc, CADO, and Galeries Lafayette?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive understanding of how multi‑brand gift cards can be used across different retailers: where the cards are valid (online, in‑store, specific departments), the duration of validity, whether multiple cards can be combined, printing requirements, and any limitations on specific goods or services (e.g., catering, services). Relevance is established by documents that describe these policies, acceptance networks, and specific usage instructions for each card type, while ignoring content unrelated to these topics such as unrelated e‑gift card systems.

title: Lamb Tajine Prep
description: Looking for a lamb tajine recipe that explains the exact steps to brown the lamb, slow‑cook it in a traditional tagine, balances spice and sweet notes, limits total time to under 2 hours, and includes wine‑pairing suggestions.
narrative: The user wants a clear, step‑by‑step recipe with ingredient quantities, cooking method (browning, covering, simmering), a balanced spice profile, a total cooking time constraint, and a suggested wine pairing. Relevance requires detailed instructions, a precise ingredient list, the specified cooking time, and an accompanying wine recommendation.

title: Lotus Elise price comparison
description: I want to compare the Argus price range for new Lotus Elise with actual market prices of used Lotus Elise to assess depreciation.
narrative: The user is looking for documents that provide the new Argus price band for the Lotus Elise and listings of used Lotus Elise, including details such as year, mileage, gearbox type, engine and fuel consumption, so they can evaluate value loss over time. Documents that only mention other car models or general automotive information without specific pricing or Lotus Elise details are considered irrelevant.

title: Veal Paupiettes Variation
description: What are creative ways to prepare veal paupiettes that go beyond classic mushroom or tomato sauces?
narrative: The user seeks innovative recipes for veal paupiettes, looking for different stuffing ideas, sauce alternatives, and alternative cooking methods such as baking, oven, or cook‑eo. Trusted cooking sites describing veal paupiettes with unique ingredients or techniques should be considered relevant. Conversely, documents that merely mention vegetables or give general cooking advice without specifying veal paupiettes, or that discuss unrelated dishes, should be deemed irrelevant.

title: Car Solar Film
description: I want to know which solar films are safe, legal and effective for protecting my car windows from heat and UV, and how to install them correctly.
narrative: The user is looking for specific guidance on automotive solar film compliance (e.g., TLV requirements), safety benefits such as UV blockage and heat reduction, product options (pre‑cut vs. custom kits), and step‑by‑step installation procedures.

title: Petit Bateau Locations
description: Where can I find a nearby Petit Bateau store and what product ranges are available either in-store or online?
narrative: The user intends to locate the closest Petit Bateau retail outlet (including pickup points) by city, region or postal code, and assess whether the store stocks the brand’s key collections for women, men, babies and children. Relevance is determined by references to the official store directory, map or search tools that enable locating the nearest shop, and by mention of product categories such as Breton tops, sweaters, dresses, children’s clothing or underwear. Non‑retail or unrelated content (e.g., wooden stoves, unrelated e‑commerce platforms) is considered irrelevant.

title: Renault Employee Car
description: How can I purchase a Renault employee car, what discounts are available, and what financing or lease‑to‑own options can I choose?
narrative: The user seeks specific details on buying a Renault employee (collaborateur) vehicle through an authorized agent such as Elite Auto. They want realistic discount percentages, LOA or lease‑to‑own plans, insurance coverage, terms and conditions, and a comparison with standard new‑car pricing. Relevant documents must discuss employee car pricing, professional discounts, financing breakdowns, and official partner status, while unrelated content about other brand collaborator programs should be excluded.

title: War School Resources
description: What publications and resources are available from the School of War?
narrative: The user is researching the School of War's library and ordering system, so relevant documents should discuss e‑books, print formats, purchasing procedures, contact addresses, and policies.  Material that only references other war conflicts, unrelated institutions, or general military topics should be excluded.

title: Reload Rights Eligibility
description: What conditions must be met to reload my Pôle Emploi unemployment benefits after returning to work?
narrative: The user has recently resumed employment before exhausting earlier ARE entitlement and seeks a clear explanation of the eligibility criteria for reloading those rights—including required working hours or days, recent legislative thresholds (November 2020, 2021 changes), the distinction between conditions before and after 1 November 2019, the role of the right of option, and the necessary paperwork or contact with the adviser to trigger the reload process.

title: AXA Client Login
description: Where and how can I access my AXA customer area, distinguishing between insurance and banking services, and what steps do I need to take if I forgot my password or username?
narrative: The user wants guidance on accessing their AXA client area, clarifying the differences between insurance and banking portals, and instructions for secure login, password recovery, and contact options.

title: EV Purchase Guide
description: What are the total costs, available subsidies, and battery warranties for buying an electric car in France?
narrative: The user is a prospective electric-vehicle buyer in France looking for a comprehensive snapshot of the financial outlay and support mechanisms that apply to a new EV purchase.  The goal is to understand the full price (list price, taxes, insurance), the extent of applicable incentives such as the green bonus, conversion premium, and regional aids, as well as the duration and percentage of the battery guarantee.  Relevance requires information that addresses these points—price ranges for specific models, subsidy eligibility rules, and battery warranty terms—while excluding generic marketing promotions, unrelated historical overviews, or non‑financial vehicle specs.

title: Edibility of Diseased Tomatoes
description: Are tomatoes infected with downy mildew still safe to eat?
narrative: The user wants clear guidance on whether tomatoes (and potentially potatoes) showing symptoms of downy mildew or late blight can be consumed safely, how disease affects flavor and storage, whether such fruit can be canned, and what precautions (e.g., cutting out affected parts, monitoring pH) should be taken. Relevant documents must discuss health risk assessments, culinary safety, storage guidelines, and recommendations for handling or disposing of diseased produce. Non‑relevant documents that merely describe disease spread, genetic details or unrelated potato varieties should be excluded.

title: Pole Shift Prophecy
description: Seeking evidence and timelines for the predicted global pole shift, three‑day darkness, and Nibiru‑related events cited by Padre Pio and other prophetic sources.
narrative: User wants to evaluate the credibility of these claims, compare them to scientific literature on geomagnetic reversal, solar activity, and asteroid impacts, and identify any corroborating data such as satellite observations, seismic records, or astronomical warnings.

title: Space History Streaming
description: Where can I legally stream or download the 1987 film 'La Folle Histoire de l'Espace' (a Mel Blacks comedy) in French or the original language?
narrative: The user wants up‑to‑date information on legitimate platforms that offer the movie, including official streaming services, purchase or rental options, and any regional restrictions or availability of French subtitles. Relevance requires documents that mention legitimate distribution channels, licensing details, and language options; documents describing torrents, private sharing sites or unrelated topics are excluded.

title: Prevail Verb
description: What are the meanings, uses, and conjugations of the verb "prevail"?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive overview of the verb "prevail", including its primary senses (to exist, dominate, succeed), its grammatical conjugation patterns, and illustrative usage examples in context. Relevant documents must provide definitions, conjugation tables, and example sentences that clarify nuance; documents unrelated to the verb (e.g., craftsman regulations) are not pertinent.

title: Uncharted Territory Program
description: What is France 2's 'Rendez‑vous en terre inconnu' show, and what are its notable episodes, hosts, and production details?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive overview of the French television series, including its creation, format, guest celebrities, episode destinations, and recent host changes, focusing on factual information rather than unrelated commentary.

title: Truffle Potato Crush
description: What are the best ways to incorporate black truffle potato crush into a balanced diet, and what are its nutritional properties, allergen content, and potential health concerns?
narrative: The user wants information specifically about the frozen black truffle potato crush product—its ingredients, nutrition facts, usage instructions, consumer reviews, and any health warnings (such as allergens or suitability during illness). Relevance is limited to documents that provide detailed product descriptions, nutritional values, allergen lists, and cooking guidance. Documents that describe general potato recipes, fish cooking times, or encyclopedic potato biology are not relevant. The goal is to guide the user in safely and health‑wise using this product.

title: Paris Event Venue
description: I need a large event space in Paris that can host conferences or exhibitions, with information on capacity, amenities, and booking details for Espace Charenton.
narrative: The user is planning a sizable event and wants to evaluate venues in Paris, specifically Espace Charenton. Relevance requires documents that describe the venue’s size, event capacity, facilities offered, pricing, booking instructions, and proximity to transport. Documents that merely discuss the town of Charenton-le-Pont or unrelated historical or administrative content are not relevant.

title: Renewable Supplier Comparison
description: Looking for a cost-effective, 100% renewable electricity supplier that offers transparent billing and flexible switching options.
narrative: The user wants to compare renewable energy providers in France, weighing price, contract flexibility, green credentials, and customer service quality, and is specifically interested in suppliers that provide 100% green electricity, no hidden fees, and straightforward switching procedures.

title: EV6 Battery Specs
description: What are the battery capacity, charging capabilities, and V2L options of the Kia EV6?
narrative: The user is evaluating whether the Kia EV6 meets their energy and range needs. They need explicit technical details: the energy capacity in kWh, the DC fast‑charging power and the time to 10‑80 % charge, the on‑board AC charger rating, the vehicle‑to‑load (V2L) option, and any differences between trim levels (Propulsion, AWD, GT). Documents that provide these specifications are considered relevant; documents that mention only marketing, test drives, or unrelated Kia models are not.

title: Gaul Ancestry Myth
description: How did the claim that modern French people descended from ancient Gauls develop, and what primary sources, archaeological evidence, and genetic studies support or challenge this claim?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive historiographical and archaeological review of the 'Gaulian ancestry' narrative, examining Caesar’s accounts, 19th‑century nationalist historiography (e.g., Lavisse), 20th‑century critical scholarship, and contemporary genetic studies that investigate the continuity between ancient Celtic peoples of Gaul and the genetic profile of the modern French population. Relevant documents must address how national myths have shaped this perception and whether scholarly evidence substantiates the idea of a direct ancestral link.

title: Faro Car Rental Comparison
description: Which car rental offer at Faro Airport provides the best value for a 4‑day holiday rental?
narrative: The user is planning a short stay in Faro and wants to pick a car rental that balances price, convenience, and service quality. Criteria for relevance include: 1) Total cost per day (including taxes, fees and airport surcharge), 2) Free cancellation up to 24 hours before pickup, 3) Availability of an electronic toll tag (e‑tag) or prepaid tolling, 4) Inclusion of basic insurance or an optional coverage plan, 5) Pickup and drop‑off locations—preferably both at Faro International Airport—and 6) Customer ratings or reviews regarding cleanliness and staff friendliness. Documents that mention any of these factors in the context of Faro Airport rentals should be considered relevant, while general Madeira or other Portuguese locations, or unrelated travel content, should be excluded.

title: Station‑Airport Car
description: I want to compare renting a car from Nantes station versus Nantes airport, especially regarding one‑way rental availability, pricing, vehicle options, and any age restrictions.
narrative: The user plans to travel into Nantes by train and needs to rent a vehicle from the train station, then possibly drop it off at Nantes‑Atlantic Airport on a one‑way basis. They want to know which agencies (ADA, Europcar, Loc Eco, etc.) offer one‑way rentals, the price differences, vehicle categories available (economy, compact, electric), as well as age and licence requirements. Relevance is judged by documents that discuss station and airport rental options, one‑way policies, pricing, vehicle selection, and driver eligibility.

title: Integrated Potato Disease Management
description: How can I combine cultural, biological, and chemical practices to control the most common potato diseases and pests while maintaining crop yield?
narrative: The user seeks detailed, evidence‑based guidance on integrated pest and disease management (IPM) for potatoes, including disease identification, environmentally friendly treatments, crop rotation, resistant varieties, and chemical options, with emphasis on practical implementation in a home garden context.

title: Beaujolais Nouveau Production
description: How is Beaujolais Nouveau produced, from grape selection to the legal labeling and marketing schedule?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive, step‑by‑step overview of the Beaujolais Nouveau production chain, including agricultural practices, vinification stages, certification requirements, and the timing of the third Thursday November release. Relevance is judged by inclusion of factual details on grape varieties, fermentation protocols, labeling rules, and the commercial launch calendar.

title: Boat Shoe Selection
description: What are the key factors to consider when buying a men's boat shoe suitable for both sailing and casual wear?
narrative: The user seeks detailed guidance on choosing a men’s boat shoe that balances maritime performance and everyday comfort. Relevance requires information on materials (chromed leather, nubuck, rubber), construction (full‑leather upper, laces vs no‑laces), sole characteristics (non‑slip, soft vs firm, ability to dry quickly), waterproofing and maintenance instructions, size and fit options, brand comparison (TBS, Sebago, Helly Hunter, etc.), price ranges, and any special features such as quick‑drying or antimicrobial treatments. The response should also mention durability, recommended cleaning methods, and how the shoe performs both at sea and on land.”}

title: Buy Electric Renault
description: I want to compare the options for buying a new electric Renault, including model choices, pricing, available tax‑incentives, lease terms, and how each model fits my requirements.
narrative: The user is evaluating a purchase or lease of a new electric Renault. Relevance hinges on documents that detail specific electric models (e.g., Twingo E‑Tech, Megane E‑Tech, Zoe), their list prices, available ecological bonuses, lease (LLD) options, mileage limits, and feature descriptions such as battery size or interior space. Documents providing these data should be considered relevant; unrelated financial or unrelated automotive content should be deemed irrelevant.

title: Corfu Car Rental Comparison
description: What is the most cost‑effective way to rent a car in Corfu that includes unlimited mileage, free cancellation, and trusted agencies?
narrative: The user seeks to compare car rentals in Corfu across price per day, pickup and return locations, included insurance and deductibles, unlimited mileage, free cancellation up to 48 hours, and agency reputation or user reviews. Relevance is determined by documents that list daily rates, agency names, insurance terms, mileage policy, cancellation clauses, and pick‑up/return point details.

title: Family car rental
description: Find affordable family car rentals in Reunion Island with free child seats, unlimited mileage and airport pickup.
narrative: The user is planning a family holiday in Reunion and requires a vehicle that accommodates multiple passengers and luggage, provides free child seats, offers unlimited mileage to explore the island, and is priced reasonably. Relevance is judged by documents that specifically list these features and allow airport pickup. Documents that lack these criteria or focus on unrelated services are not relevant.

title: Eco‑SUV Budget
description: What used electric or hybrid SUVs in Switzerland cost under 25,000 CHF and have travelled less than 50,000 km?
narrative: The user is a Swiss customer looking for an affordable, low‑mileage eco‑friendly SUV.  They need listings that specify powertrain type (EV or hybrid), price, mileage, vehicle brand, and that are physically available in Switzerland.  Relevant documents will contain AutoScout24 or Auto Selection pages that provide searchable filters for Swiss region, EV/hybrid tag, price ceiling, mileage ceiling, and specific automotive brands.  Documents that do not include these filterable attributes or are generic international classified sites that lack the Swiss‑specific data and brand filtering are considered irrelevant.

title: Film vs Reality: Road Violence
description: How does the depiction of road accidents and gang violence in Mad Max compare to real-world road‑accident compensation laws and practices?
narrative: The user seeks a comparative analysis between the film’s chaotic, gang‑driven road encounters and the legal framework governing road‑accident compensation, specifically in France. Relevant documents must discuss key plot events in Mad Max that involve road violence or law‑enforcement conflict, and at the same time explain or illustrate French road‑accident compensation mechanisms (Badinter law, compensation scales, case examples, etc.). Non‑relevant content such as general news, cannabis‑related reports, or unrelated achievements should be excluded.

title: Concert Parking Accessibility
description: Which events at Arkéa Arena in Bordeaux provide accessible parking and accommodations for people with reduced mobility?
narrative: The user wants to attend a concert or other event at Arkéa Arena and needs to know about parking availability, specific tariffs, and disability accommodations, including contact lines for assistance. Relevant information should include event listings, parking rates, reduced‑mobility seating details, and any dedicated service phone numbers. Documents that contain this data (e.g., Arkéa Arena contact numbers, parking tariffs, and accessibility notes) are considered relevant, while unrelated concert promotions and unrelated venue details are not.

title: Women Farmers Indre
description: What archival documents and letters exist about women farmers in Indre‑et‑Loire, particularly those collected by Menie Grégoire between 1969 and 1976?
narrative: The user is looking for primary source material—letters, broadcast transcripts, and related event records—that illustrate the everyday lives and community roles of rural women farmers in Indre‑et‑Loire during the late 20th century. Relevant documents should come from the Indre‑et‑Loire departmental archives, reference Menie Grégoire’s fonds, or be part of related Wikipedia‐contributing initiatives; unrelated sports, municipal, or non‑archival content should be excluded.

title: Ombudsman Rights
description: I want to understand when and how I can use the National Energy Ombudsman to resolve a dispute with my energy supplier.
narrative: The user seeks detailed procedural information about eligibility, time limits, required documentation, application steps, and contact methods for the National Energy Ombudsman. Relevance is judged by whether documents explain the Ombudsman's role, eligibility criteria, timelines, and the steps to lodge a complaint.

title: Budget Office PC comparison
description: Which budget‑friendly office PCs provide at least 16 GB RAM, SSD storage, and optional macOS or Windows, suitable for a small business, and offer free shipping or bundled software deals?
narrative: The user is a small‑business owner looking to equip a few workstations.  They need machines that balance cost, performance, and reliability, with clear trade‑offs between Windows and Mac ecosystems.  Relevance criteria include the price range (under €1500), 16 GB RAM or more, SSD capacity (≥512 GB), support for office productivity suites, available free shipping or bundled subscriptions (e.g., Microsoft 365, Apple Pro Apps), and reputable retail/repair service.  The requested information should guide the user to a selection of concrete products with comparative features, warranty options, and practical buying tips.

title: Silver Print Evolution
description: What were the major technological milestones in the development and use of silver photographic printing from the 19th to early 20th centuries?
narrative: The user wants an in‑depth historical overview of silver printing, focusing on chemical processes (collodion, gelatin silver, direct blackening), key inventions and inventors (Daguerre, Talbot, Van Monckhoven, Eastman, Lumière), and the evolution of related equipment. Relevant texts must present dates, procedural details, and contextual significance; general forum posts, modern digital photography discussions, or unrelated content are not useful.

title: Leek Lardons Quiche
description: I need a concise, step‑by‑step recipe for a leek quiche with lardons that includes exact ingredient quantities, leek preparation, pastry choice, and baking instructions.
narrative: The user wants a straightforward recipe that focuses on the core elements: properly cleaned and sliced leeks, sautéed lardons, a pastry base, and a custard of eggs, cream, and milk. The recipe should give clear ingredient measurements, cooking times, and baking temperatures, and it should exclude extraneous marketing content, user comments, or unrelated variations.

title: Recreational Points
description: How can points be earned in recreational games, and what is the current status of new recreational game releases?
narrative: The user is a regular player of the educational software’s recreational section and wants to clarify whether points can still be earned in these games, what the points system actually covers, and whether new recreational games are being added or scheduled for release. Relevant documents include comments about the lack of point earning in recreational games, the removal of flash‑based titles, announcements about upcoming sports‑game additions (e.g., tennis), and age‑limit information for the recreation section.

title: Cross‑border Aid
description: What steps do I need to take to receive Pôle emploi mobility assistance for a job interview in another country?
narrative: The user is a registered job seeker in France who must travel abroad for a job interview. They need to understand the eligibility criteria (distance, contract type, unemployment benefit status), the application process with their Job Centre, available voucher options (travel, accommodation, meals), reimbursement ceilings, deadlines, and whether host‑family accommodation via the SAM network can be used. Only documents that detail international mobility assistance, eligibility rules, application procedures, and related services are relevant.

title: Linking Email to SFR
description: How can a (former) SFR or Numericable customer link their e‑mail address to their client space to enable password recovery and invoice notifications?
narrative: The user wants to understand the step‑by‑step process for adding or linking an e‑mail address to their SFR client account, including the use of verification codes, the impact on password reset workflows, and how this linkage affects receipt of invoice alerts via e‑mail or SMS. Relevance is determined by documents that describe e‑mail linking, password recovery, invoice notification, and account login procedures for SFR, LICO, and former Numericable customers.

title: Lamp Wick Selection
description: What factors should I consider when choosing a wick for an oil lamp, and how do different wick types (e.g., cotton, fiberglass, flat, round) compare in performance, safety, and compatibility with lamp models?
narrative: The user is a hobbyist or collector looking to optimize the lighting quality and safety of their oil lamps. Relevance hinges on information about wick materials, widths (expressed in lines), compatible lamp designs (glass, spout, beak types), burning characteristics (flame size, steadiness), fuel types (kerosene, paraffin, soybean oil), maintenance tips (rewriting, replacing, checking wick condition), and safety considerations such as avoiding excessive oil contact or using refined fuels. Content that does not address these criteria or focuses on unrelated lamp products or general history is considered irrelevant.

title: Madeira Car Rental Insights
description: What are the best options for renting a car in Madeira, including cost, insurance, vehicle type, and pickup/return logistics?
narrative: I need a detailed comparison of car rental offers in Madeira that covers total price (incl. insurance and fuel), deductible coverage, suitable vehicle categories for the island’s steep, winding roads, and convenient pick‑up/return locations (especially at Funchal Airport). Relevance requires documents that provide up‑to‑date rates, information on all‑risk coverage, deductible options, vehicle specs for hilly terrain, booking procedures, and practical tips for airport pick‑up and return. I also want insights on seasonal price variations and any promotional discounts that could lower the overall cost for an 8‑day stay.

title: Boiling Potatoes Skin
description: What is the effect on texture, taste, and nutrient retention when boiling potatoes with or without the skin, and should they cool in their cooking water?
narrative: The user seeks evidence‑based guidance on cooking potatoes in water: whether to peel them before boiling, whether to let them cool in the same water, and how these practices affect flavor, texture, and nutrient loss. Relevant documents must present experimental observations, quantitative results, or clear conclusions about peeled versus unpeeled potatoes and the cooling process.

title: Return Bonus RSA
description: Which conditions allow a RSA beneficiary to receive the return-to-work bonus after resuming a CDI for only one month, and what documents must be submitted?
narrative: The user has recently returned to work after having been on RSA. They wonder if they can claim the return-to-work bonus after only a month of work, whether a CDI qualifies, and which paperwork is required. They also want to know if the bonus has been discontinued, how to check eligibility in their department, and how to apply for APRE or similar assistance. They need information on conditions such as minimum hours, contract duration, and proof of resumption, as well as clarification on how the benefit interacts with other allowances like SSA and Christmas bonus.
